title: CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS - 211info
text: CHI ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides child passenger safety services, including seat checks and installation education. Offers car seats and booster seats at discounted rates. 2801 St Anthony Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Vary (541) 276-5121 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-5121 Emily Smith INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Prices vary. Car seat fittings and education are offered free of charge. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Child Passenger Safety Education Child Passenger Safety Seat Inspections Child Passenger Safety Seats Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHI ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL
